post.description: Generates a new JSON settings backup for all settings areas. If an alternate backup location has been set, the backup is also copied to that location.

get.summary: Get list of JSON backups on device

post.description: Restores the specified JSON backup. `Directory` is either `JsonBackups` (local) or `JsonBackupsAlternate` (configured alternate device). `GET /api/backups/configuration/list` can be used to obtain valid directory and filename combinations.

Returns plugin-specific file info for the specified file path. The plugin name, extension category, and file path are read from route parameters. The metadata command is defined in the plugin's `pluginInfo.json`.
Moves the specified file from the `uploads` directory to the correct media subfolder based on its extension, returning a status of `OK` or an error message if not successful.
Notifies any plugin that has registered an `onUpload` handler for the given file extension. `:ext` is the extension category and `**` is the file path.

post.description: Handles chunked file uploads via `PATCH` (TUS-style). A `POST` to the same route initiates the session and returns a unique upload ID. Each `PATCH` request delivers a chunk identified by `Upload-Name`, `Upload-Offset`, and `Upload-Length` headers; when all chunks arrive, the file is assembled.

delete.description: Deletes the specified file or directory from a media directory. Validates the resolved path against the allowed base directory to prevent path traversal.

get.summary: List output groups with live state
get.description: Returns every configured audio output group together with its member sound cards. Volume/mute for groups and member cards are read live from PipeWire (`volumeSource: "live"` when the sink is running, else the saved config value with `volumeSource: "config"`).

200.description: Output groups with live runtime state

get.summary: Get one output group with live state
get.description: Returns a single audio output group (by numeric group id) with its member sound cards and live runtime volume/mute.

200.description: Output group with live runtime state

post.summary: Mute or unmute a member sound card
post.description: Sets the mute state of an individual sound card within an output group, addressed by its ALSA card id. Provide `mute` (bool) or `toggle: true`. Applied live and persisted.

200.description: Member mute state applied and persisted

post.description: Sets the volume (0-150%) of an individual sound card within an output group, addressed by its stable ALSA card id (e.g. `S3`). Applied live to the member filter-chain sink and persisted.

post.summary: Mute or unmute an output group
post.description: Sets the mute state of an output group's combined sink. Provide an explicit `mute` boolean, or `toggle: true` to flip the current state. Applied live and persisted.
Sets the master volume (0-150%) of an audio output group's combined PipeWire sink. The value is applied live and persisted to the group config so it survives a reboot.

get.description: Returns every configured input group (mix bus) with its members and the output groups it routes to. Member volume/mute reflect the saved config (`volumeSource: "config"`) plus a live `running` flag indicating whether the loopback node is currently active.
Returns a single input group by numeric id with its members and routing targets.

post.summary: Mute or unmute an input-group member
post.description: Sets the mute state of a member within an input group, addressed by zero-based member index. Loopback nodes have no mute property, so mute is implemented by driving channelmix volume to 0 and unmute restores the saved member volume. Provide `mute` (bool) or `toggle: true`.

200.description: Member mute state applied and persisted

404.description: Member not found in input group

post.description: Sets the volume (0-100%) of a member within an input group (mix bus), addressed by its zero-based member index. Applied live to the member loopback via channelmix and persisted. Note: the primary fppd stream's volume is governed by fppd itself, not a loopback.

404.description: Member not found in input group

get.description: Returns the full input-group to output-group routing matrix. For every input group, each possible output-group path is listed with its connected state, per-path volume and mute. Values reflect the saved config (`volumeSource: "config"`).

post.summary: Mute or unmute a routing path
post.description: Sets the mute state of a single input-group to output-group routing path. Mute drives the routing channelmix volume to 0; unmute restores the saved per-path volume. Provide `mute` (bool) or `toggle: true`. Persisted to the input-group routing config.

200.description: Route mute state applied and persisted

post.description: Sets the volume (0-100%) of a single input-group to output-group routing path. Applied live to the routing combine-stream and persisted to the input-group routing config.

get.description: Reports whether the PipeWire backend is active, the systemd service health of the PipeWire/WirePlumber/pulse units, and configured group counts. Use this to discover capability before issuing control calls.
Returns the status of all 5 fppd media stream slots (idle/playing). Slot 1 additionally reports the currently playing media filename and timing from fppd.

post.description: Sets the volume (0-100%) of an fppd media stream slot (1-5). Slot 1 uses fppd's built-in volume control; slots 2-5 are set live via PipeWire channelmix on the stream node. The response `control` field indicates which path was used.
